description: Base tenant type schema for Account Management. Derived tenant type schemas resolve behavioral traits via x-gts-traits. Traits configure system behavior for processing tenants of each type — they are not part of the tenant instance data model.

can_be_root.description: Whether tenants of this type can be root tenants (parent_id = null).

allowed_parent_types.description: GTS instance identifiers of tenant types allowed as parent. Empty array means no nesting allowed (root-only or leaf-only depending on can_be_root).

idp_provisioning.description: Whether tenants of this type typically require dedicated IdP-side resources. Account Management still calls IdpProviderPluginClient::provision_tenant and deprovision_tenant; provider implementations may use this trait to decide whether to create resources or complete as a no-op.
